title: Mellow Jamaican Tofu Curry
description: A creamy, jammy Jamaican-inspired curry featuring tofu, coconut milk, nutmeg, and allspice for a comforting, dairy‑free dinner.
instructions: Press tofu to remove excess moisture, then cut into 1‑inch cubes.
Whisk together soy sauce, lime juice, ground nutmeg, allspice, and dried thyme; toss tofu cubes until evenly coated.
Heat coconut oil in a large skillet over medium heat, then add diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add the marinated tofu to the skillet, sauté for 4 minutes until lightly browned on all sides.
Pour in diced tomatoes and coconut milk, then stir in curry powder.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer gently for 15 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary, then remove from heat.
Serve the curry hot over steamed rice or with flatbread if desired.
